name: Marketing Manager
description: Marketing managers plan and execute campaigns that drive brand awareness, lead generation, and revenue growth. They oversee channels, budgets, and teams to achieve measurable business outcomes.
bullets: Grew organic traffic 180% in 12 months through SEO strategy and content marketing program targeting high-intent keywords
Managed $500K annual ad budget across Google and LinkedIn, achieving 4.2x ROAS and 35% reduction in cost-per-lead
Launched customer advocacy program generating 150+ case studies and testimonials that shortened sales cycle by 20%
